numerical_constraints.name: Minimum plint height – Carré
numerical_constraints.condition: Ground floor plint (BG/PLINT) of the Carré building type

reasons: Value is clearly annotated in the section diagram for the Carré typology with 'Plint H min. 4 m'.
Source is a beeldkwaliteitplan (image quality / design guidelines document), which is informative/advisory rather than binding regels.
Minimum height is unambiguous (min. = ten minste).

numerical_constraints.notes: Shown in section diagram for Carré typology. BG/PLINT label with annotation 'Plint H min. 4 m'. Confidence capped at 0.85 as this is a beeldkwaliteitplan (image quality plan), not a binding regels document.

numerical_constraints.name: Maximum building layers – Carré OR (central block)
numerical_constraints.condition: OR (openbare ruimte-facing) portion of the Carré typology

reasons: Section diagram shows 5E as the topmost floor of the OR portion of Carré.
Source is a beeldkwaliteitplan, not binding regels.
Counting of bouwlagen from diagram requires interpretation; BG/PLINT is a separate ground level, then 1E–5E above it.

numerical_constraints.notes: Section diagram shows the OR block reaching 5E (5 bouwlagen above BG/PLINT), while the Cluster portions show 3E. Counting from BG/PLINT + 1E through 5E = 6 levels total including plint; diagram labels suggest 5E is the top floor of the taller section.

numerical_constraints.name: Maximum building layers – Carré Cluster portions
numerical_constraints.condition: Cluster portions of the Carré typology (flanking sections)

reasons: Section diagram shows 3E as the topmost floor of the Cluster portions of Carré.
Source is a beeldkwaliteitplan, not binding regels.
Bouwlagen count read from diagram labels.

numerical_constraints.notes: Section diagram shows Cluster blocks reaching 3E above BG/PLINT. Source is a beeldkwaliteitplan.

narrative_constraints.statement: The Carré building typology consists of a ground-floor plint (BG/PLINT) of minimum 4 m height, flanked by lower Cluster volumes (up to 3E) and a taller central OR-facing section (up to 5E), separated by rooilijnen at the cluster edges.

reasons: Section diagram is clearly labelled for the Carré typology.
Beeldkwaliteitplan is advisory, not binding; confidence capped accordingly.

programme_hints: Carré building type includes BG/PLINT (ground floor plint), flanking Cluster residential volumes, and a central taller OR block. Reference images show activated ground-floor plinten with commercial/public uses and residential upper floors.
urban_intent_passages: Carré typology with a minimum plint height of 4 m, stepped massing from flanking Cluster volumes (3 bouwlagen) to a taller central OR-facing section (5 bouwlagen), defined by rooilijnen at cluster transitions.
